negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_105
prompt: The video opens with a view of an open white refrigerator in a simple, indoor setting, likely an office or a small room. The refrigerator is white and contains various items on its shelves: a bottle of Coca-Cola, a water bottle, and several cartons of milk or juice. The interior lighting is bright, highlighting the contents clearly. The floor is covered with a dark, patterned carpet, and the walls are plain white. In the background, a person stands at the right side of the frame dressed in dark clothing with a camera at the same angle. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing both the refrigerator and the person. As the video progresses, a robotic arm is seen on the right side, approaching the refrigerator door. The robotic arm, equipped with a gripper, moves smoothly and controlled, closing the refrigerator door. The arm's movements are deliberate, ensuring the door is securely shut. Once the door is closed, the robotic arm retracts slightly, completing the action. The final frame shows the refrigerator door fully closed, with the robotic arm retracted back to its original position. The scene remains static, with no further movement or changes occurring. The refrigerator, now closed, is still in the same position as at the beginning, with the same items inside. The background remains unchanged, maintaining the same indoor setting with the person standing near the furniture.
